data.title: OSE Immunotherapeutics to Present a Novel, First-in-Class, FPR2 Agonist Monoclonal Antibody in the Resolution of Chronic Inflammation  at the AAI 2026 Meeting
data.description: OSE Immunotherapeutics will showcase their innovative FPR2 agonist monoclonal antibody, a first-of-its-kind, for treating chronic inflammation at the AAI 2026 conference. This antibody targets FPR2, a key receptor involved in regulating inflammation. The presentation aims to highlight the antibody's potential in resolving chronic inflammation. This development represents a significant advancement in immunotherapy research and holds promise for improving patient outcomes.

data.title: Borr Drilling Limited - Announces Pricing of $260 million of 3.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2033
data.description: Borr Drilling Limited (NYSE: BORR) and (Euronext Growth Oslo: BORR) have disclosed the successful pricing of senior notes worth $260 million. These notes, due in 2033, have been offered to qualified investors by the Company.

data.title: Swiss GRC Appoints Rajeev Dutt as Managing Director MEA & APAC
data.description: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, Swiss GRC has named Rajeev Dutt as the Managing Director for the Middle East, Africa, and Asia-Pacific regions. This move is aimed at enhancing the leadership team in these key areas. Formerly the General Manager for the region, Dutt will now oversee the overall growth of Swiss GRC's business in MEA and APAC. With over 25 years of expertise in Governance, Risk, and Compliance, he brings valuable experience to this expanded role.

data.title: Bitcoin enthusiasts suggest freezing quantum-susceptible coins through BIP-361 to boost value for remaining coins.
data.description: The authors characterized it as a "personal motivation for improvement" since the disappearance or locking of coins will increase the value of other coins by a small amount.

data.title: Bitcoin may surpass gold as conflict in Iran shows potential. Bitwise estimates if 17% SoV market is captured, 1BTC=$1M.
data.description: According to Bitwise's Matt Hougan, if Bitcoin is able to secure 17% of the market share for store-of-value within the next ten years, there is a potential for its value to reach $1 million per coin.

data.title: Vivoryon Therapeutics N.V. to Report Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Business Updates on April 23, 2026
data.description: Vivoryon Therapeutics N.V. is set to share its financial results for the full year of 2025 along with important updates on its business operations on April 23, 2026. This announcement is anticipated to provide important insights into the company's performance and strategic direction. Investors and stakeholders are keen to learn about the numbers and plans that will be disclosed during this event. Stay tuned for further details on Vivoryon Therapeutics N.V.'s developments on the given date.
